results.title: What is the most expensive thing in no man’s sky?
results.snippet: 12 dec 2024 · The most expensive item in No Man’s Sky is the Salvaged Technology Data (ST-DS). Each ST-DS costs a staggering 16,161,600 units, which is a significant amount of in-game currency.
